title: Mission to Ord Mantell (Clone Wars)
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Otheruses|Mission to Ord Mantell}} {{Conjecture|legends}} {{Mission |prev= |conc= |next=[[Battle of Garqi (Clone Wars)|Battle of Garqi]]{{CWACite|4|Orders (comic story)}} |image=[[File:OrdMantellMission-ThePackage.jpg]] |name=Mission to Ord Mantell |conflict=[[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]{{CWACite|3|The Package (comic story)}} |objective=Recover [[The Package|stolen package]] from [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] |date=[[22 BBY/Legends|21.5 BBY]], 6 [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|First Battle of Geonosis]] |place=[[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] |result=*[[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] victory; package recovered and Trandoshan bounty hunters [[Death/Legends|killed]] *Both [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] [[Squad/Legends|squads]] killed, save for [[Sarge (clone commando)|Sarge]] |side1=Galactic Republic |side2=Trandoshan bounty hunters |side3= |side4= |commanders1=Sarge |commanders2=Lead Trandoshan bounty hunter |commanders3= |commanders4= |unit1= |unit2= |unit3= |unit4= |ppl1=*8 clone commandos **[[Sarge's clone commando squad (Ord Mantell)|Sarge's clone commando squad]] ***Squad ordnance specialist ***Squad pilot ***[[Unidentified clone commando sniper|Squad sniper]] **a [[Unidentified clone commando squad (Ord Mantell)|clone commando squad]] |ppl2=*9 Trandoshans *3 [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1-Series battle droids]] *1 [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droid]] |ppl3= |ppl4= |casual1=All [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] except Sarge |casual2=All Trandoshan bounty hunters and [[Droid/Legends|droids]] |casual3= |casual4= |civilian= }} {{Quote|Last night, Trandoshan bounty hunters intercepted a package of ''extreme diplomatic'' importance, intended for ''Supreme Chancellor Palpatine''. They intend to sell it to the Separatists. You are going to make sure that situation does not occur.|An [[Unidentified Advanced Recon Commando (intelligence officer)|ARC trooper intelligence officer]]|}} The '''mission to Ord Mantell''' was a mission undertaken by two [[Squad/Legends|squads]] of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic's]] [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] to the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]], during the [[22 BBY/Legends|first year]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. After an [[The Package|important package]] bound for [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] from [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]] [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomats]] was stolen by a group of [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]], the Republic [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] of both squads were sent to Ord Mantell to retrieve the parcel and return it to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] before the Trandoshans could sell it to the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Separatists]]. On Ord Mantell, the [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] located and engaged the [[Bounty/Legends|bounty]] hunters, but [[Unidentified clone commando squad (Ord Mantell)|one squad]] was [[Death/Legends|killed]] when the Trandoshans struck back with [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonators]]. The [[Sarge's clone commando squad (Ord Mantell)|other squad]] tracked the bounty hunters as they attempted to flee, and destroyed a number of [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] sent to retrieve the object, though one of the squad members fell to [[Droid/Legends|droid]] [[Blaster/Legends|fire]]. When the squad finally confronted the Trandoshan bounty hunters, a [[Lightfight|firefight]] ensued in which two [[Unidentified clone commando sniper|more]] commandos and all but the Trandoshan's leader were killed. squad's [[Clone Sergeant/Legends|sergeant]] and only surviving member, [[Sarge (clone commando)|Sarge]], jumped onto the final bounty hunter as he attempted to flee, killing him, and recovering the package for the Republic. The package would turn out to be little more than a Malastarian trinket of which was little interest to Chancellor Palpatine, and following its delivery, the Chancellor had the item stored away with numerous other [[Politics/Legends|political]] gifts. ==Prelude== {{Quote|Wouldn't this be a better job for an ''ARC'' trooper?''"
"''Negative. Exchange is going to happen on Ord Mantell. Busy streets, lots of civilian interference. We need two teams, eight men, on the streets and ready.''"
"''Sir, any idea what's in the package?''"
"''No. But you will die for this parcel, if it comes to that. Understood?''"
"''Affirmative.|Sarge and an ARC trooper officer|}} [[File:Sarge_briefing.jpg|thumb|left|250px|The commando squads are briefed for the Ord Mantell mission by an ARC trooper officer]] Approximately six [[Standard month/Legends|months]] after the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|start]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]]-spanning conflict between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] known as the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomats]] from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Malastare/Legends|Malastare]] arranged for a [[The Package|political gift]] to be delivered to [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] of the Republic. However, before the package could be delivered, it was intercepted by a group of [[Trandoshan/Legends|Trandoshan]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] and stolen, with the intent to sell the item to the Confederacy. When the Republic became aware of the situation, the [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] of [[Sarge (clone commando)|Sarge's]] [[Sarge's clone commando squad (Ord Mantell)|squad]] and [[Unidentified clone commando squad (Ord Mantell)|another squad]] were called to the headquarters of [[Republic Intelligence/Legends|Republic Intelligence]], where they met with an [[Unidentified Advanced Recon Commando (intelligence officer)|Advanced Recon Commando]] [[Officer/Legends|officer]]. In one of the intelligence headquarters' briefing rooms, the [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|ARC trooper]] informed the two [[Commando/Legends|commando]] [[Squad/Legends|squads]] of the situation that had developed, and tasked them with retrieving the package from the bounty hunters. Though clone commando [[Sarge (clone commando)|Sarge]] felt that the job was better suited to an ARC trooper, the [[Cloning/Legends|clones]] journeyed to [[Ord Mantell/Legends|Ord Mantell]] where the intended sale of the diplomatic package to the Confederacy was to be made. ==The mission== ===Ambush and pursuit=== {{Quote|I see the package. Second speeder.''"
"''Good. Now we thin the ranks.|[[Unidentified clone commando sniper|The squad's sniper]] and leader|}} Upon arriving on Ord Mantell, the commandos went about preparing for their attack on the bounty hunters. At midday, Sarge's [[Sarge's clone commando squad (Ord Mantell)|squad]] took to a nearby roof overlooking the street the clones had tracked the Trandoshans to, while [[Unidentified clone commando squad (Ord Mantell)|the other]] held position on the ground. The [[Soldier/Legends|soldiers]] of the latter squad positioned a large [[Groundcar/Legends|truck]] in the street under the premise of mechanical troubles in order to bring the convoy of three [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeders]] the Trandoshan bounty hunters occupied to a halt. Once stopped, the rooftop squad's ordnance specialist fired on the lead [[Speeder/Legends|speeder]] with a [[Missile launcher/Legends|missile launcher]], destroying it. The ground squad then leaped into action, assaulting the remaining speeders. The Trandoshans managed to pull away, however, and as they hurried off, tossed several [[Thermal detonator/Legends|thermal detonators]] from the rear of their vessel that [[Death/Legends|killed]] their attackers. From their rooftop position, [[Unidentified clone commando sniper|the other squad's sniper]] [[Sniper rifle/Legends|shot]] the driver of the rearmost speeder in the head, causing the speeder to drift out of control and crash, killing the remaining occupants. [[File:White_Squad.jpg|thumb|right|250px|As the Trandoshans flee, Sarge's squad hurries to pursue them]] With two of the three bounty hunter-aligned speeders destroyed and the third fleeing the area, the surviving commandos rushed to ground level where they boarded a speeder [[Pilot/Legends|piloted]] by one of their own. The squad tracked the Trandoshans through the streets of Ord Mantell toward the industrial yards, but when they arrived, there was no sign of where the bounty hunters had gone; Sarge ordered his [[Gender/Legends|men]] to split up and search the area for the hunters. The squad's pilot would be the unlucky soldier to locate the hunters inside a building adjacent to the open courtyard where they had arrived, and received a spray of [[Blaster/Legends|blaster]] bolts from the Confederacy [[Battle droid/Legends|battle droids]] the Trandoshans were meeting with as his only reward. The squad leader quickly threw an [[Electromagnetic pulse grenade/Legends|EMP grenade]] through the door, shorting out the group of [[B1-series battle droid/Legends|B1]] and [[B2-series super battle droid/Legends|B2 super battle droids]], before storming in and destroying them with their [[DC-17m Interchangeable Weapon System/Legends|DC-17m]] [[Blaster rifle/Legends|blaster rifles]]. ===Assault=== {{Quote|Breach that door!|Sarge|}} [[File:Sarge.jpg|thumb|left|250px|Sarge attacking the leader of the Trandoshan bounty hunters]] Once the [[Droid/Legends|droids]] were destroyed, the commandos set their sights on a [[Blast door/Legends|blast door]] at the rear of the building and the squad demolitions expert set a [[Detonation pack|charge]] on the door that blew an entrance for the soldiers. The surprised Trandoshans rushed behind their speeder for cover as the clone commandos stormed the room with weapons firing. The squad's explosives man was shot and killed by one of the bounty hunters, but a [[Grenade/Legends|grenade]] from Sarge left the Trandoshans dead. However, the Trandoshan leader had been hiding, and once the commandos' guard had been dropped, he struck from behind: firing a shot from his [[Wrist blaster/Legends|wrist blaster]], he struck the ordnance module on the squad [[Sniper/Legends|sniper's]] [[Backpack/Legends|pack]], detonating it, killing its wearer, and nearly taking out the squad leader as well. With the survivor down, the Trandoshan leader attempted to flee again, but the clone commando jumped onto his back, dragging him down. Holding him by the neck, the clone ejected the [[Vibroblade/Legends|vibroblade]] on his right hand's [[Gauntlet vibroblade/Legends|knuckle plate]] and stabbed the bounty hunter in the chest, proclaiming it as vengeance for his squad's deaths. He then retrieved the package the clones had been sent after, and solemnly left to deliver it to Republic Intelligence as instructed. ==Aftermath== [[File:The_Package.jpg|thumb|right|200px|The package is delivered to Chancellor Palpatine, who finds it unimpressive]] {{Quote|Ah yes. A gift from the Malastare diplomats. I imagine it has some great value—to them. Place it in the storage closet with the others. I have more important matters to deal with.''"
"''As you wish.|[[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Chancellor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] and [[Mas Amedda/Legends|Mas Amedda]], upon receiving the package|}} The package Sarge had recovered was delivered to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] by Republic Intelligence, and presented to Chancellor Palpatine in [[Office of the Supreme Chancellor/Legends|his office]] by [[Galactic Senate/Legends|Galactic Senate]] [[Vice Chair/Legends|Vice Chairman]], [[Mas Amedda/Legends|Mas Amedda]]. Despite the effort in which Sarge and his commando brothers had gone to in order to retrieve the package, Palpatine found the gift from Malastare's diplomats to be little more than a trinket he dismissed as unimportant. The Republic Chancellor ordered Amedda to store the unwanted gift in a storage closet among a slew of similar gifts. Sarge, his squad now dead, was reassigned as the sergeant of [[Aiwha Squad]], a new unit which he would lead until [[Declaration of a New Order|the end]] of the Clone Wars. ==Behind the scenes== The mission to Ord Mantell first appeared in the story ''[[The Package (comic story)|The Package]]'', from the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume 3|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures Volume'' 3]] of the [[Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures (graphic novels)|''Star Wars: Clone Wars Adventures'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comics]], [[Author/Legends|written]] by [[Ryan Kaufman (real person)|Ryan Kaufman]]. ==Appearances== *{{CWACite|3|The Package (comic story)}} {{1st}} ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{Interlang |de=Mission von Ord Mantell (22 VSY) |es=Misión a Ord Mantell (Guerras Clon) |pl=Misja na Ord Mantell }} {{DEFAULTSORT:Ord Mantell (Clone Wars), mission to}} [[Category:Battles of Ord Mantell]] [[Category:Missions of the Clone Wars]]
